reason: Schedule-table self-fix targets CLAUDE.md and monitor/prompts/tinker.md, both in workspace-sync NEVER_PUSH (CLAUDE.md explicit; tinker.md via dynamic monitor/prompts/*.md rule). Tinker's clone PAT was 403/Devilwench-denied for direct push, and NEVER_PUSH files are NOT covered by the universal-pusher rescue path. Stranded for operator manual application in own clone with direct push.
operator_action: 1) cd to your clone with direct push. 2) Apply the two find/replace patches below. 3) node test.js (must still pass 3519/0). 4) git add CLAUDE.md monitor/prompts/tinker.md && git commit -m 'tinker: schedule-row corrections (op local times)' && git push. 5) Move this file to monitor/decisions/applied-stranded-patches/ once landed.

patches.description: Monitoring Pipeline schedule-table rows for integrity / tinker / social — corrected from stale 'Daily 9 AM / 10:30 AM / 11 AM' to actual cron times in operator local time.
patches.find:
| dome-integrity | Daily 9 AM | Haiku | `structure-integrity.md` | Site health: links, tabs, build drift, data-prose consistency |
| dome-tinker | Daily 10:30 AM | Opus | `tinker.md` | Pipeline ops: audit, trace handoffs, cost engineering |
| dome-social | Daily 11 AM | Sonnet | `social.md` | Machine-readable layer, discoverability, search rankings |
patches.replace:
| dome-integrity | Daily 02:00 (op local) | Haiku | `structure-integrity.md` | Site health: links, tabs, build drift, data-prose consistency |
| dome-tinker | Daily 03:30 (op local) | Opus | `tinker.md` | Pipeline ops: audit, trace handoffs, cost engineering |
| dome-social | Daily 04:30 (op local) | Sonnet | `social.md` | Machine-readable layer, discoverability, search rankings |
patches.rationale: Verified via list_scheduled_tasks: cron expressions are '0 2 * * *' / '30 3 * * *' / '30 4 * * *' (interpreted in operator local timezone, BST). lastRunAt observations match — integrity 01:08 UTC = 02:08 BST, tinker 02:39 UTC = 03:39 BST, social 03:36 UTC = 04:36 BST. The previous '9 AM / 10:30 AM / 11 AM' values do not match real cron in any timezone.

patches.description: Tinker context schedule-table rows for Integrity / Tinker / Social — same correction as CLAUDE.md.
patches.find:
| Integrity | `structure-integrity.md` | Daily ~9 AM | `monitor/integrity/` |
| Tinker | `tinker.md` | Daily ~10:30 AM | `monitor/tinker/` (reports, proposals) |
| Social | `social.md` | Daily ~11 AM | `monitor/social/` (rankings, drafts), direct `docs/llms.txt` updates |
patches.replace:
| Integrity | `structure-integrity.md` | Daily ~02:00 (op local) | `monitor/integrity/` |
| Tinker | `tinker.md` | Daily ~03:30 (op local) | `monitor/tinker/` (reports, proposals) |
| Social | `social.md` | Daily ~04:30 (op local) | `monitor/social/` (rankings, drafts), direct `docs/llms.txt` updates |
patches.rationale: Same as P1 — tinker.md table mirrors CLAUDE.md. tinker.md L24 explicitly directs: 'NOTE: Verify these schedules against actual cron expressions each run. ... If the table above is wrong, update it.' This run did so but couldn't push, so stranding.

verification_pattern: grep -q 'Daily 02:00 (op local)' CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'Daily ~02:00 (op local)' monitor/prompts/tinker.md && echo FIXED || echo STILL_BROKEN
context: Tinker also wrote a fuller report at monitor/tinker/report-2026-05-07T02-40.json (in the same commit batch as this stranded patch). The report's findings[0] documents this self-fix as 'fix_applied: true' from tinker's perspective — that's accurate locally in the clone but the fix never reached origin. Operator should re-frame as 'fix_applied via operator hand-off' once these patches land.
